script:
set +e
echo '=== verify per-user accounts are in azureuser group ==='
for u in afrah aixa alejandro ashley axel cameron david emily jesusr jose lia neil neilc rosi stephanie zahid; do
  groups "$u" 2>&1 | head -1
done
echo '=== chmod 0640 master credential (was 0600) ==='
chmod 0640 /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '=== verify aixa can read via group membership now ==='
runuser -u aixa -- head -c 60 /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo
echo '=== test claude as aixa ==='
runuser -u aixa -- bash -c 'echo hi | timeout 30 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --max-turns 1 --output-format text 2>&1' | head -8
echo '=== test claude as azureuser (mskai) still works ==='
runuser -u azureuser -- bash -c 'echo hi | timeout 30 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --max-turns 1 --output-format text 2>&1' | head -8
echo '===END==='
